customers_say: Customers find this electronic lock to be of good quality, simple to configure and use, and appreciate its appearance. The functionality receives positive feedback, with one customer noting the technician spent adequate time explaining how it works. They value the service, with one mentioning excellent technician service, and find the features helpful. Customers consider the lock worth its price.

reviews.author: Amith
reviews.title: Must buy and worth the buy
reviews.body: Manjunath installed the lock and walked us through the entire process of handling it with patience. Very professional and customer centric approach

reviews.body: Very nice service by rankesh vishwakarma, easy installation nice product
